  "preconditions": [
    "a and b must support the addition operation"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "returns the result of a + b",
    "result type is the same as the type of a or b, depending on their types"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "a or b is NaN (Not a Number)",
    "a or b is infinity",
    "a and b are of different types",
    "a or b is a complex number"
  ]
}

raw_outputs.groq2:
{
  "preconditions": [
    "a must be a number",
    "b must be a number"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "The result is the sum of a and b",
    "The result is a number"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "If a is infinity, the result is infinity",
    "If b is infinity, the result is infinity",
    "If a is -infinity, the result is -infinity",
    "If b is -infinity, the result is -infinity",
    "If a is NaN, the result is NaN",
    "If b is NaN, the result is NaN"
  ]
}
